title: Draft invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of draft invoices for a single employee.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all draft invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

maxDate.description: The latest date of any draft invoice.

minDate.description: The earliest date of any draft invoice.

customerNumber.description: The employee number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: The unique self reference of the employee resource.

accountingYears.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals accounting years resource.

periods.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals periods resource.

customers.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals employees resource.

self.description: A reference to the current resource.
